name: go-duplicate-same-dir-asks
desc: a new Go def whose name already exists in another file of the SAME package (dir) is a real collision → ask

name: go-duplicate-not-defined-elsewhere-clean
desc: a new def whose name exists nowhere else in the snapshot is not a duplicate → no ask

name: go-duplicate-different-dir-clean
desc: same name in a DIFFERENT directory is an unrelated package symbol the compiler keeps distinct → no ask

name: go-duplicate-test-file-skipped
desc: test files legitimately reuse symbol names across files → the check skips an edited _test.go

name: go-duplicate-cross-language-clean
desc: a Go def sharing a name with a Python sibling is not a collision (separate namespaces) → no ask
